sanskrit:
अपि चेत्सुदुराचारो भजते मामनन्यभाक्।
साधुरेव स मन्तव्यः सम्यग्व्यवसितो हि सः॥
transliteration: api cet su-durācāro bhajate mām ananya-bhāk | sādhur eva sa mantavyaḥ samyag vyavasito hi saḥ ||
literal_meaning: Even if a grave wrong-doer worships Me single-heartedly, he must be deemed righteous, for he has rightly resolved.
contextual_meaning: A single-pointed devotional intention overrides the psychological ledger of past misdeeds; identity is re-anchored in the present orientation toward the Whole, not the historical trail of errors.
psychological_state: Post-fall growth: the nervous system moves from shame-based shutdown to approach-oriented safety, allowing re-integration of self-concept through unconditional positive regard.
trigger_scenario: A recovering addict, sober 90 days, hears whispers about his past at work; instead of hiding, he keeps volunteering at the shelter and leading meetings, trusting that consistent service re-writes his story.
anchor_text: Wholehearted devotion rewrites your past; your present love defines you now.
